did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Bound volume of notes from Professor Eugene P. Andrews course on Greek architecture.

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Cornell University Class of 1906, M.A. 1916, Ph.D. 1923.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Bound volume of notes from Professor Eugene P. Andrews course on Greek architecture.

did.unittitle: Bound volume of notes from Professor Eugene P. Andrews course on Greek architecture
